tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

                               Mike Posner  -  Cooler Than Me

           -----------------------------------------------------------------------


Tabbed by: Staccato27


Had this one stuck in my head for a while, and decided to learn it, but all the other tabs are incorrect,
which was rage inducing, to say the least.
So I figured it out by ear and wrote this up.
Enjoy!

The song is in Gm, so with a capo third, it's Em. Without a capo, it's Eb F Gm. So if you don't have a capo,
hit the handy transpose button on the left, and bring it up 3 steps, so the blue highlighted chords should 
say Eb F Gm.


[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
     If I could write you a song,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
to make you fall in love, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I would already have you up under my arm.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I used up all my tricks,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
I hope that you like this.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But you probably won't, [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
You think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
You got designer shades, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Just to hide your face and[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You wear them around like, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
You're cooler than me.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
yeah, you never say hey, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Or remember my name. and[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's probably cause, [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
you think you're cooler than me.[/tab]


*electronic bass comes in, just play the same progression*

[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You got your hot crowd, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Shoes on your feet, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
and you wear them around, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Like they ain't shit.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
But you don't know, [/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
The way that you look, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
When your steps[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Make. That. Much. Noise? Shh [/tab]


Pre-chorus
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
See I got you, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
all figured out, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
You need everyone's eyes just to feel seen.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Behind your make-up [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
nobody knows who you even are[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Who do you think that you are?[/tab]

Chorus
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
If I could write you a song,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
and make you fall in love, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I would already have you up under my arm.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I used up all my tricks,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
I hope that you like this.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But you probably won't, [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
You think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
You got designer shades, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Just to hide your face and[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You wear them around like, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
You're cooler than me.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
and you never say hey, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Or remember my name. and[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's probably cause, [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
you think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

Verse 2
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You got your hot crowd, [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
Switching your walk, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
and you don't even look when you pass by.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
But you don't know, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
The way that you look, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
When your steps[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Make. That. Much. Noise? Shh [/tab]

Pre-chorus

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
See I got you, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
all figured out, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
You need everyone's eyes just to feel seen.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Behind your make-up [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
nobody knows who you even are[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Who do you think that you are?[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    
'Cause it sure seems ('cause it sure seems)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   
You got no doubts (that you got no doubts)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]    
But we all see (we all see)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]  
You got your head in the clouds       (That sustained vocal note in the recording is a Bb, [/tab]
                                       which is a 5th
                                       for the Eb, or C relative to the capo)
                                       So it sounds really good if you keep your pinky on
                                       that 3rd fret (relative to the capo on the e string
                                       for this next chorus.


Chorus
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
If I could write you a song,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
and make you fall in love, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I would already have you up under my arm.[/tab]

But you probably won't, [/tab]

You think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

You got designer shades, [/tab]

Just to hide your face and[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You wear them around like, [/tab]

You're cooler than me.[/tab]

and you never say hey, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Or remember my name. and[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's probably cause, [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
you think you're cooler than me.[/tab]


*electronic outro*
